title: LOOP-RUN.md frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter block of a .planning/loops/<UTC-timestamp>-<project_id>.md file produced by tasks:loop / tasks:bug-smash. See docs/loop-run-schema.md for the full contract.

run_id.description: Stable identifier minted by the orchestrator at run start; used to dedupe re-emissions.

project_id.description: wood-fired-tasks project id the loop drained.

orchestrator_session_id.description: Claude Code session id of the orchestrating session. Joins to agent_transactions_v.session_id.

total_tokens.description: Best-effort roll-up of input + cache_create + cache_read + output tokens across the subagent <usage> blocks available at emit time; NOT authoritative. `null` when unmeasured (orchestrator-session tokens are not captured at emit time). Present-but-nullable: emit `null`, never omit. Authoritative figure is the post-run agent_transactions_v cross-check.

total_usd.description: Best-effort roll-up of USD cost across the subagent <usage> blocks available at emit time (cache-discounted); NOT authoritative. `null` when unmeasured (orchestrator-session USD not captured at emit time). Present-but-nullable: emit `null`, never omit. Authoritative figure is the post-run agent_transactions_v cross-check.

subagents_dispatched.description: Count of distinct subagent sessions spawned during the run.

tasks_attempted.description: Tasks picked up during the run (PASS + FAIL + PARTIAL + NOT_VERIFIED).

gate_decision.description: Wave 4.2 (#319) + Wave 11 — outcome of the §2f topology pre-flight gate. `allowed` = topology=FLAT, default flat ordering. `auto_ordered` = topology=DAG, loop auto-computed a Kahn topological execution order (Wave 11 default). `overridden` = topology=DAG plus `--i-know-what-im-doing`, loop skipped the auto-sort and used flat ordering with warning. `blocked` = topology=DAG_CYCLIC (cannot be overridden), or the pre-Wave-11 DAG-without-override halt; loop halted before any worker dispatch. Optional for backward compatibility with pre-#319 emissions.

execution_model.description: Configurable Task Models (#924) — model ref the run forced for worker (execution-role) dispatches via the `--execution-model` run-arg override (see skills/tasks/loop-shared.md §R). A concrete model id or the literal `auto`. Omitted entirely when unset (the run used per-project resolve_model resolution). Pure provenance for replay; optional for backward compatibility with pre-#924 emissions.

validation_model.description: Configurable Task Models (#924) — model ref the run forced for verifier (validation-role) dispatches via `--validation-model` (see §R). Concrete id or `auto`. Omitted when unset. Optional.

planning_model.description: Configurable Task Models (#924) — model ref the run forced for planning-role dispatches via `--planning-model` (see §R). Concrete id or `auto`. Omitted when unset. Optional.
